hero_subtitle: Real-time position, PNR status, offline cell-tower tracking — all in one place.
no_location: Live GPS coordinates not available for this train yet.
pnr_not_found: PNR not found. Please check the number and try again.
error_fetch: Could not connect to server. Please check your internet connection.
about_desc: Where Is My Train is an offline-first Indian Railways tracker. It uses Android cell-tower triangulation to estimate train position even without internet, and falls back to live APIs when online.
feat_offline_desc: Estimate position using nearby cell towers — no data needed.
feat_offline_desc_long: Uses Android TelephonyManager to read MCC/MNC/CID of nearby towers. These are matched against a pre-loaded SQLite database of 40+ towers mapped to rail corridors. A weighted centroid algorithm estimates your train's position offline.
feat_map_desc: See your train's real-time position on an interactive map.
feat_map_desc_long: Powered by Leaflet.js with CartoDB dark tiles. Shows an animated train marker with a pulsing radius and tap-to-see station popup.
feat_alarm_desc: Get notified before your destination arrives.
feat_crowd_desc: Help extend offline coverage by sharing cell data.
feat_crowd_desc_long: With explicit user consent, cell tower readings are anonymously uploaded to Firebase Firestore to improve offline coverage for future passengers. No personal data is stored.
privacy_desc_long: Cell tower IDs are processed entirely on-device. No location data is ever sent without your explicit consent. The crowdsource feature requires authentication and stores only tower identifiers, never user identity.
disclaimer: This app is not affiliated with Indian Railways or IRCTC. Live data is subject to API availability.
